title: Xtra Peppery Syrian Fish Poke
description: A peppery and aerated Syrian dish featuring sashimi-cut fish, perfect for a hangover cure, with a twist of rice krispies for added crunch, this dish is gluten-free friendly.
instructions: Prepare the sashimi grade fish by cutting it into small cubes and placing it in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, lemon juice, salt, garlic, and Syrian pepper paste.
Pour the mixture over the fish and toss to coat.
Sprinkle the black pepper over the fish and toss again to combine.
In a separate bowl, crush the Rice Krispies into smaller pieces.
Add the crushed Rice Krispies to the fish mixture and toss gently to combine.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the mixture a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the Xtra Peppery Syrian Fish Poke chilled, garnished with additional black pepper if desired.
